_meta.source: Transcribed from TTS mod card sheets (games/dark-souls/scout/inventory.json decks). Cell = CardID % 100, row-major.
_meta.iconLegend: Verified against core rulebook p.40/p.27: ring=nearest character, skull=aggro-token character, crowned shield=push (number on shield=push damage), wave-curl=leap, d-pad number in top petal + target=move N toward target, number in bottom petal + target=move N away from target, number in a direction petal without target=shift N that direction (top=forward, bottom=backward), big arch arrow=turn 180, small curved arrow=turn 90, sword-shield N=physical damage, spiky-sun N=magical damage, thin starburst=area attack (all nodes in attack arcs), circle-dot=node attack, snowflake=frostbite, grey stone arrow=stagger, black circle xN=repeat, flame=heat-up card. Arc circle: green diamond=attack arc, orange=weak arc, black/white=neutral; top of circle=front.

schema.behavior: { cell, name, heatUp, range (number | 'infinite' | 'special' | null=no attack), dodge, repeat?, arcs {attack[], weak[]} | null, ops[] in printed left-to-right order }
schema.ops: move {distance, toward nearest|aggro|awayFromNearest|awayFromAggro, push} | shift {distance, direction forward|backward|left|right, push} | turn {degrees, direction?} | leap {to, push, pushDamage?} | attack {type physical|magical, damage, style area|node|target|template, target?, push?, stagger?, frostbite?, arcs? (only when card prints multiple arc circles)} | stagger | flight | fireBeamTemplate | special
schema.notes: Cards with one printed arc circle carry it at card level 'arcs'; ops carry 'arcs' only when the card prints one circle per attack. specialAbility texts are concise mechanical paraphrases of the printed rule, not verbatim prose.

flags: OIK Blasted Nodes (oik cells 13-18): graphical node-pattern maps, patterns NOT transcribed (pattern: 'graphical').
Kalameet Fiery Ruin (kalameet cells 14-21): graphical strafe node maps, patterns NOT transcribed (pattern: 'graphical').
OIK Fire Beam movement d-pad prints its 0 in the bottom petal (recorded as move 0 / no movement).
Kalameet Mark of Calamity prints an orange orb glyph after the attack (recorded as op 'special' calamityMark; exact token rule from digest/rulebook).

Smelter Demon Lunging Strike is weak RIGHT but Flaming Lunging Strike is weak LEFT, and Double Sweep attacks F+R/weak L while Flaming Double Sweep attacks F+L/weak R - verified asymmetries, not typos.
fourkings cells 21-23 (Bequeathed Lord Soul, Four Kings Sword, Cursed Cavern) are reward/encounter cards, not behaviours - excluded.
digestDisagreements: Add-ons digest 'Heavy Punch (Voracious Mimic)' example lists damage 5; the actual Voracious card is damage 6 (the Hungry Mimic card is the 5).
Core digest said skull icon = nearest character; rulebook p.40 legend shows skull = character with aggro token, ring = nearest character. All transcriptions use the corrected legend.

data.special: When a character blocks an attack from the Winged Knight with a block roll of 3 or more, that character gains 1 stamina cube (spends 1 stamina).
If the Titanite Demon would suffer 3 or more damage from a single attack roll, reduce that damage by 1.
After heat up, characters in the Gargoyle's node must spend 1 additional stamina to attack.
The Boreal Outrider Knight never gains Frostbite or Stagger tokens.
After a heat up behaviour card is drawn and resolved, shuffle the behaviour deck.

ornstein.special: Both bosses activate each turn. When Smough dies, Ornstein gains 10 Health and his heat up cards become the new behaviour deck. Ornstein spawns on the Main Boss node.

smough.special: Both bosses activate each turn. When Ornstein dies, Smough gains 15 Health and his heat up cards become the new behaviour deck. Smough spawns on the Mini Boss node.

data.special: The first three times the Old Dragonslayer loses 4 or more Health from a single attack, add one random heat up card to the top of the behaviour deck.
When the Hungry Mimic is defeated, draw treasure as if the party had opened two chests.
data.note: Mimic behaviour cards print no arc diagrams; mimics ignore facing. No heat up cards.

data.special: When the Voracious Mimic is defeated, draw treasure as if the party had opened two chests.
data.note: Mimic behaviour cards print no arc diagrams; mimics ignore facing. No heat up cards.

data.special: On heat up, replace the behaviour deck with 5 randomly chosen Heat Up cards.
On heat up, remove 2 random behaviour cards from the deck, then add all 3 Heat Up cards and shuffle.
Limping Strike is not a starting or Heat Up card. When Sif is reduced to 3 Health or less, replace the behaviour deck with the Limping Strike card.

data.threatNote: Data card prints X in the threat position.
data.special: The encounter starts with King One. The first three times you would flip over the behaviour deck, perform a summoning heat up instead (the next King and its behaviour cards enter).

excludedCells.21: Bequeathed Lord Soul (equipment reward: Tier 3 for each stat is 40 while equipped)

data.special: After heat up, increase the damage and dodge difficulty of all Fire Beam cards by +1.
Kalameet's behaviour deck always includes the Mark of Calamity and Hellfire Blast cards.
